metadata.changes:
Change 1: Replace:
  # ---------- Aggregate mission/crew data ----------
      from collections import defaultdict
  
      # Store role information per mission
      mission_info: dict[str, dict[str, list[str]]] = defaultdict(
          lambda: {"commander": [], "backupPilot": [], "crew": []}
      )
      other_triples: list[Triple] = []
  
      # Keep track of each astronaut's role(s) on missions
      astronaut_roles: dict[str, list[tuple[str, str]]] = defaultdict(list)  # astronaut -> list of...
  
      for t in triples:
          p = t.predicate.lower().replace(" ", "")
          if p == "mission":
              # subject is astronaut, object is mission -> crew member
              mission_info[t.object]["crew"].append(t.subject)
              astronaut_roles[t.subject].append(("crew member", t.object))
          elif p == "crewmembers":
              # object is astronaut, subject is mission -> crew member
              mission_info[t.subject]["crew"].append(t.object)
              astronaut_roles[t.object].append(("crew member", t.subject))
          elif p == "commander":
              # subject is mission, object is astronaut -> commander
              mission_info[t.subject]["commander"].append(t.object)
              astronaut_roles[t.object].append(("commander", t.subject))
          elif p == "backuppilot":
              # subject is mission, object is astronaut -> backup pilot
              mission_info[t.subject]["backupPilot"].append(t.object)
              astronaut_roles[t.object].append(("backup pilot", t.subject))
  ... (126 more lines)
with:
  # ---------- Aggregate mission and astronaut data ----------
      from collections import defaultdict
  
      # Build lookup for mission operators
      operator_map: dict[str, str] = {}
      # Store nationality for later adjective use
      nationality_map: dict[str, str] = {}
  
      # Keep role information per astronaut (role, mission)
      astronaut_roles: dict[str, list[tuple[str, str]]] = defaultdict(list)
      # Keep other triples that are not role or operator information
      other_triples: list[Triple] = []
  
      for t in triples:
          p = t.predicate.lower().replace(" ", "")
          if p == "operator":
              operator_map[t.subject] = t.object.strip().strip('"')
          elif p == "nationality":
              nationality_map[t.subject] = t.object.strip().strip('"')
          elif p == "mission":
              # astronaut -> mission, default role crew member
              astronaut_roles[t.subject].append(("crew member", t.object))
          elif p == "crewmembers":
              # mission -> astronaut, default role crew member
              astronaut_roles[t.object].append(("crew member", t.subject))
          elif p == "commander":
              # mission -> astronaut
              astronaut_roles[t.object].append(("commander", t.subject))
          elif p == "backuppilot":
              astronaut_roles[t.object].append(("backup pilot", t.subject))
  ... (20 more lines)
